signatures.label: SELECT [DISTINCT] columns FROM table [WHERE condition] [ORDER BY column]

documentation.value: Retrieves rows from one or more tables based on specified columns and optional conditions.
Column names, expressions, or `*` for all columns
The table or view to query from
Optional WHERE clause to filter rows

signatures.label: INSERT INTO table (col1, col2, ...) VALUES (val1, val2, ...)

documentation.value: Inserts one or more new rows into a table.
The target table name
The columns to insert values into
The values to insert

signatures.label: UPDATE table SET col1 = val1 [, col2 = val2 ...] [WHERE condition]

documentation.value: Modifies existing rows in a table.
The table to update
Column-value pairs to set
Optional WHERE clause to specify which rows to update
Removes rows from a table that match the optional condition.
The table to delete from
Optional WHERE clause to specify which rows to delete
Creates a new table with specified columns, data types, and constraints.
The name of the new table
Column definitions with data types and optional constraints (PRIMARY KEY, NOT NULL, etc.)

signatures.label: ALTER TABLE table_name ADD|DROP|MODIFY column definition

documentation.value: Modifies the structure of an existing table (add, drop, or modify columns).
The table to alter
The column change: ADD column datatype, DROP COLUMN name, MODIFY COLUMN name datatype
Combines rows from two or more tables based on a related column. Types: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER, CROSS.
The table to join with
The join condition, e.g. `t1.id = t2.foreign_id`
Returns the number of rows that match the specified criteria.
A column name, `*` for all rows, or `DISTINCT column` for unique values
Returns the total sum of a numeric column.
A numeric column or expression to sum
Returns the average value of a numeric column.
A numeric column or expression to average
Returns the maximum value in a set of values.
A column or expression to find the maximum of
Returns the minimum value in a set of values.
A column or expression to find the minimum of
Returns the first non-NULL value in the list of arguments.
The first value to check
The second value to check (and so on)

signatures.label: CASE WHEN condition THEN result [WHEN ...] [ELSE result] END

documentation.value: Evaluates a list of conditions and returns one of multiple possible results.
A boolean expression to test
The value to return when the condition is true
Converts an expression from one data type to another.
The value to convert
The target data type (e.g. INT, VARCHAR, DATE, DECIMAL)
Groups rows that have the same values in specified columns, typically used with aggregate functions.
The column(s) to group by
